root_cause: Graphiti.add_episode() calls fulltext dedup query O(n) in relationship count. At 3401 edges, TIMEOUT=10000ms insufficient.
fix_applied: Implemented write_episode_directly() bypassing Graphiti dedup. Direct FalkorDB writes.
outcome: 0 errors, 1268 episodes ingested successfully in single run.

root_cause: karma-server container has no volume mount for /ledger. Container created without -v flag.
outcome: Consciousness loop confirms running. Next cycle will write to correct path.

root_cause: Attempted to inject autonomy messaging into system prompt string. Literal newlines in JavaScript string literal created unterminated string error.
fix_applied: Reverted server.js to backup (server.js.bak). Confirmed syntax valid.
outcome: Hub-bridge operational. System prompt reverted to baseline.

root_cause: GLM-5 and MiniMax API keys expired or became invalid between sessions. OpenAI fallback still working.
fix_applied: User provided fresh keys. Restarted karma-server with updated credentials.
outcome: Router shows both models registered. MiniMax responds to direct /v1/chat/completions tests.

root_cause: Entity schema mismatch. Expected colby:User node but FalkorDB uses different entity structure.
fix_applied: Tool error handled gracefully. GPT iteration 1: tool_calls attempted, 404 response. GPT iteration 2: saw error, decided not to retry, returned response from context.
outcome: Graceful degradation working. System doesn't crash on tool error.
